name: Cybernetic Neon Drift
description: Synthwave melódico com batida marcante e um arpejo brilhante.
code:
# FRUITY CYBER DAW LIVE CODE - EDITOR MODE
bpm = 120

# Setup kick
kick = Synth("kick")
kick.oscillator = "kick"
kick.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.12, 0.5, 0.1)
kick.setFilter(120, 1.0)
kick.setDelay(0, 0.25)
kick.play("x .*3 x .*3 x .*3 x .*3")

# Setup snare
snare = Synth("snare")
snare.oscillator = "snare"
snare.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.15, 0.5, 0.1)
snare.setFilter(1000, 1.0)
snare.setDelay(0, 0.25)
snare.play(".*4 x .*7 x .*3")

# Setup hihat
hihat = Synth("hihat")
hihat.oscillator = "hihat"
hihat.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.05, 0.5, 0.05)
hihat.setFilter(7500, 1.0)
hihat.setDelay(0, 0.25)
hihat.play("x*16")

# Setup bass
bass = Synth("bass")
bass.oscillator = "sawtooth"
bass.setEnvelope(0.01, 0.25, 0.6, 0.15)
bass.setFilter(950, 6.0)
bass.setDelay(0, 0.25)
bass.play("C3*2 Eb3*2 F3*2 G3*2 C3*2 Eb3*2 F3*2 G3*2")

# Setup lead
lead = Synth("lead")
lead.oscillator = "square"
lead.setEnvelope(0.01, 0.18, 0.3, 0.1)
lead.setFilter(1400, 3.0)
lead.setDelay(0.4, 0.2)
lead.play("C4 . Eb4 . G4 . C5 . Bb4 . G4 . F4 . Eb4 .")

print("CyberDAW Engine Initialized successfully!")

name: Acid Industrial
description: Techno industrial e ácido com sintetizador analógico 303.
code:
# FRUITY CYBER DAW LIVE CODE - EDITOR MODE
bpm = 135

# Setup kick
kick = Synth("kick")
kick.oscillator = "kick"
kick.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.15, 0.5, 0.1)
kick.setFilter(100, 1.0)
kick.setDelay(0, 0.25)
kick.play("x .*3 x .*3 x .*3 x .*3")

# Setup snare
snare = Synth("snare")
snare.oscillator = "snare"
snare.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.15, 0.5, 0.1)
snare.setFilter(1000, 1.0)
snare.setDelay(0, 0.25)
snare.play(".*4 x .*7 x .*3")

# Setup hihat
hihat = Synth("hihat")
hihat.oscillator = "hihat"
hihat.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.05, 0.5, 0.05)
hihat.setFilter(7500, 1.0)
hihat.setDelay(0, 0.25)
hihat.play("x . x . x . x . x . x . x . x .")

# Setup bass
bass = Synth("bass")
bass.oscillator = "sawtooth"
bass.setEnvelope(0.01, 0.12, 0.4, 0.1)
bass.setFilter(550, 12.0)
bass.setDelay(0, 0.25)
bass.play("D3 F3 G3 G#3 G3 F3 D3 C3 D3 F3 G3 G#3 G3 F3 D3 .")

# Setup lead
lead = Synth("lead")
lead.oscillator = "sawtooth"
lead.setEnvelope(0.01, 0.15, 0.5, 0.1)
lead.setFilter(1000, 4.0)
lead.setDelay(0.2, 0.15)
lead.play("D4 . D4 . F4 . F4 . G4 . G#4 . G4 . F4 .")

print("CyberDAW Engine Initialized successfully!")

name: Ambient Dreams
description: Pads e texturas flutuantes de sintetizador senoidal.
code:
# FRUITY CYBER DAW LIVE CODE - EDITOR MODE
bpm = 90

# Setup kick
kick = Synth("kick")
kick.oscillator = "kick"
kick.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.25, 0.5, 0.2)
kick.setFilter(80, 1.0)
kick.setDelay(0, 0.25)
kick.play("x .*7 x .*7")

# Setup snare
snare = Synth("snare")
snare.oscillator = "snare"
snare.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.15, 0.5, 0.1)
snare.setFilter(1000, 1.0)
snare.setDelay(0, 0.25)
snare.play(".*16")

# Setup hihat
hihat = Synth("hihat")
hihat.oscillator = "hihat"
hihat.setEnvelope(0.02, 0.05, 0.5, 0.05)
hihat.setFilter(7500, 1.0)
hihat.setDelay(0, 0.25)
hihat.play(".*16")

# Setup bass
bass = Synth("bass")
bass.oscillator = "sine"
bass.setEnvelope(0.1, 0.8, 0.8, 0.6)
bass.setFilter(300, 1.0)
bass.setDelay(0, 0.25)
bass.play("F3 .*3 A3 .*3 Bb3 .*3 C3 .*3")

# Setup lead
lead = Synth("lead")
lead.oscillator = "triangle"
lead.setEnvelope(0.15, 0.6, 0.6, 0.5)
lead.setFilter(900, 1.0)
lead.setDelay(0.5, 0.4)
lead.play("F4 . A4 . C5 . F5 . E5 . C5 . Bb4 . A4 .")

print("CyberDAW Engine Initialized successfully!")
